original_question:
A large cube with a side length of $n$ units is painted blue on all six sides and then is cut into $n^3$ smaller unit cubes. We are told that exactly one-third of the total number of faces of all these unit cubes are blue. Determine the value of $n$.
A) 2
B) 3
C) 4
D) 5
E) 6

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}

similar_questions.question: A large cube with a side length of 6 units is painted red on all six sides and then is cut into 6^3 smaller unit cubes. We are told that exactly one-half of the total number of faces of all these unit cubes are red. Determine the value of 6.

A large cube with a side length of 3 units is painted purple on all six sides and then is cut into 3^3 smaller unit cubes. We are told that exactly one-sixth of the total number of faces of all these unit cubes are purple. Determine the value of 3.
